metadata.description: A collection of Claude code plugins developed by b4tchkn.

plugins.name: git-toolbox
plugins.description: A plugin that provides various Git-related functionalities to interact with Git repositories.

plugins.name: qa-toolbox
plugins.description: A plugin that provides QA workflow tools for test case generation and quality assurance.

plugins.name: ccusage-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze Claude Code usage and costs using ccusage CLI to provide insights on token consumption and spending patterns.

plugins.name: claude-code-best-practice
plugins.description: A plugin that audits and automatically improves Claude Code configuration files (CLAUDE.md, settings.json, agents, skills) based on established best practices.
